goal: Update all 248 companion files that still reference aether-utils.sh and shell scripts to reference the Go binary instead. Update the source-of-truth map, architecture docs, and command definitions to accurately describe the v5.0 Go-based system. Aether migrated from shell to Go but the distributed documentation still describes the dead shell architecture — this is the root cause of recurring infrastructure gaps.

phases.description: Update 3 YAML source files and command template. lay-eggs.yaml (8 refs -> aether setup), init.yaml (1 ref), resume.yaml (1 ref), template.yaml (1 ref).
phases.name: YAML source definitions

constraints: aether setup replaces hub sync, mkdir, chmod, .gitignore generation
tasks.goal: Replace 8 aether-utils.sh references in lay-eggs.yaml with Go binary equivalents. Steps 1-4+7 collapse to aether setup.
Replace aether-utils.sh references in init.yaml with Go binary equivalents.
Replace aether-utils.sh references in resume.yaml with Go binary equivalents.
Replace aether-utils.sh example in src/commands/_meta/template.yaml with aether some-command.

tasks.goal: Batch-update 42 .aether/commands/claude/ files. Replace bash .aether/aether-utils.sh <cmd> with aether <cmd>. Handle lay-eggs.md, init.md special cases. Map build-flow-start -> context-update build-start.
Batch-update 45 .aether/commands/opencode/ files. Same replacement patterns as 2.1.
